Not only is the 1080p 32-inch model starting with an already budget-friendly full price, but the $20 cut from the tag puts it back at its all-time low. Be sure to head below and browse the full lineup of deals while they last, which make excellent opportunities to upgrade your media rooms, kids’ rooms, or elsewhere in your home and beyond.

Not much needs to be said here about what makes this security camera different. Instead of a wall outlet, it can derive it’s power from a light fixture. This paves the way for hassle-free installation and best of all, it still has a built-in light too. You can find a lot of other WYZE discounts down below that are priced from $30.

One glance probably tells you what I like here, and it’s the pivoting design. This allows it to fit all sorts of places a bulkier screwdriver cannot. Other perks include a handy carrying case, a digital display, carrying case, and USB-C charging. Head below to find a whole lot more Fanttik tools on sale from $30.
